goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
The train should 'leave after 13:45' and should leave on 'thursday'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should go to london liverpool street
